name: TitleTrackr API
description:
API documentation for TitleTrackr's external integrations.

TitleTrackr is a title abstract management platform that helps title companies
manage orders, abstracts, and projects.

## Authentication

This API uses OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow for authentication.
After obtaining an access token, include it in requests as a Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

## Webhooks

TitleTrackr supports real-time notifications via webhooks. Subscribe to events
to receive HTTP POST requests when actions occur in your account.

| Event Type | Description |
|------------|-------------|
| `order.created` | Triggered when a new order is created |
| `abstract.created` | Triggered when a new title abstract is created |
| `project.created` | Triggered when a new project is created |
